title: Runes Awakened
description: Runes adds craftable runes to Minecraft using Armor Trims. When placed in the world, runes create buff areas that can empower players with effects such as haste and flight or weaken mobs with effects such as burning, time stop, and more.
body:
# MOD REQUIRES CONTINUITY FOR GLOWING EFFECT
## Runes
Welcome to the Runes mod, a mod where you can craft runes from armor trims. Perfect for rpg/magic modpacks!

What are Runes? Runes are placeable blocks crafted from minecraft's armor trims that when right-clicked, will buff a circular area for a set amount of time. These buffs are all helpful to the player, and cannot be used against other players. All runes have their own area size, which can range from 2 blocks to 50 blocks.

What Runes are there?
Fire Rune: Burns all hostile entities in the area for a medium duration

Grass Rune: Bonemeals every block in the area for a very short duration

Mine Rune: Grants haste to players in the area for a long duration

Fairy Rune: Grants creative flight to players in the area for a very long duration.

Sand Rune: Weakens and slows all hostile entities in the area for a short duration

Shield Rune: Creates a spherical shield around the player that no one can enter or exit for a short duration

Time Rune: Freezes time for every entity in the area for a medium duration (projectiles don't work yet)

Warp Rune: Teleports the player to their spawn location after the Rune ends (very short duration)

Explosion Rune: Explodes any entity that enters the area, however the Rune gets destroyed after a entity explodes (infinite duration until triggered)

Ocean Rune: Grants dolphin's Grace and water breathing in the area for a long duration


Planned Runes: Rune for Rib trim, Vex trim, and coast trim
If the mod does well, we will update it to later versions with newer trims.

Check out the Curseforge page!: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/runes-awakened

Feel free to give us feedback, ideas and questions in the comments! Also message me on discord if you have any further questions. User: verykirbo


Feel free to use this mod in modpacks!
